Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Interface IIdentifierSymbolTable

All Superinterfaces:
ISCState, IState, ISymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>
All Known Implementing Classes:
IdentifierSymbolTable, StackedIdentifierSymbolTable
public interface IIdentifierSymbolTable extends ISymbolTable<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,IIdentifierSymbolInfo>, ISCState
State component for identifiers declared in a context or a machine, or in and abstractions and seen contexts.
Since:
1.0

    Description
    static final IStateType<IIdentifierSymbolTable>
    STATE_TYPE
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<FreeIdentifier>
    getFreeIdentifiers()
    Returns a collection of untyped free identifiers of all identifiers stored in this symbol table.
    IIdentifierSymbolTable
    getParentTable()
    Returns the parent symbol table for a stacked symbol table, and null if the symbol table is not stacked.
    IIdentifierSymbolInfo
    getSymbolInfoFromTop(String symbol)
    This method allows to access only the top level of a stacked symbol table.
    Collection<IIdentifierSymbolInfo>
    getSymbolInfosFromTop()
    This method allows to access only the top level of a stacked symbol table.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.tool.IState

    getStateType, isImmutable, makeImmutable

  • Field Details

    • STATE_TYPE

      static final IStateType<IIdentifierSymbolTable> STATE_TYPE

  • Method Details

    • getSymbolInfosFromTop

      Collection<IIdentifierSymbolInfo> getSymbolInfosFromTop()
      This method allows to access only the top level of a stacked symbol table. Returns the collection of symbol infos of the top symbol table.
      Returns:
      the collection of symbol infos of the top level

    • getSymbolInfoFromTop

      IIdentifierSymbolInfo getSymbolInfoFromTop(String symbol)
      This method allows to access only the top level of a stacked symbol table. Returns the symbol info of the top symbol table for a symbol. If the symbol is not present null is returned.
      Parameters:
      symbol - the symbol corresponding to the symbol info
      Returns:
      the symbol info

    • getFreeIdentifiers

      Collection<FreeIdentifier> getFreeIdentifiers()
      Returns a collection of untyped free identifiers of all identifiers stored in this symbol table. This collection is useful in filter modules of formulas because the filter modules are invoked before type-checking.
      Returns:
      a collection of untyped free identifiers of all identifiers stored in this symbol table

    • getParentTable

      IIdentifierSymbolTable getParentTable()
      Returns the parent symbol table for a stacked symbol table, and null if the symbol table is not stacked.
      Returns:
      the parent symbol table or null
